events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the sheet excerpt is missing its title block, revision, and matching callout, the installed motor circuit/disconnect can't be traced to the governing drawing revision — that's a document-traceability gap, not a confirmed NEC violation, so I marked it `needs_more_info` with `medium` risk and listed the corrective steps needed (obtain the full sheet with title block/revision, re-tag the field photo to the callout, and re-verify disconnect rating/conductor sizing/OCP per Art. 430 once traceability is restored).
